name: Jack Kent Cooke Foundation College Scholarship

eligibility.other_requirements: High financial need; exceptional academic ability; must apply through high school; high school seniors only (separate program for community college transfer students)

stackable_notes: JKC is a last-dollar scholarship — coordinates with institutional and federal aid to cover remaining unmet need up to the cap. Many schools specifically partner with JKC to ensure additive benefit; verify with individual institutions.
notes: Targets 'high-achieving, low-income' students specifically — the foundation defines this as students with exceptional academic records who have been held back by financial circumstances. ~65 awards annually from thousands of applicants. Also offers a separate Young Scholars Program for 7th graders and a Community College Transfer Scholarship.
